name: git_config
description: Reads and writes Git configuration at repository, global, or system level. Supports listing all config entries with origin and scope metadata, getting single or multi-values, setting new values, and unsetting keys. Structured output eliminates raw key=value parsing for agents.

path.description: Path to the Git repository or a subdirectory within it.

action.description: Config action to perform. 'list' enumerates all entries. 'get' returns a single value. 'get_all' returns all values for a multi-valued key. 'set' writes a value. 'unset' removes a key.

key.description: Configuration key to read or write (e.g. 'user.name', 'core.editor'). Required for get, get_all, set, and unset actions.

value.description: Value to write when action is 'set'.

scope.description: Restrict operation to local (.git/config), global (~/.gitconfig), or system (/etc/gitconfig) scope.

show_origin.description: Include the origin file path for each config entry. Adds --show-origin flag.

show_scope.description: Include the scope (local/global/system) for each config entry. Adds --show-scope flag.

file.description: Read from or write to a specific config file instead of the standard Git config files.

includes.description: Respect include directives when reading config. Adds --includes flag.

entries.description: Array of config entries. Populated for list, get, and get_all actions.

scope.description: Config scope (local, global, system). Present when show_scope is true.

origin.description: Path to the config file containing this entry. Present when show_origin is true.

total_entries.description: Number of entries in the entries array.

value.description: Single value returned by the 'get' action.

values.description: Array of values returned by the 'get_all' action.

key.description: The key that was modified by set or unset actions.

args: {% if scope == 'local' %}--local{% elif scope == 'global' %}--global{% elif scope == 'system' %}--system{% endif %}
{% if action in ['get','get_all','set','unset'] and key %}{{ key }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'set' and value %}{{ value }}{% endif %}

pipeline.description: Parse git config output into structured entries. Handles list (scope:origin\tkey\tvalue), get (single value), get_all (multi-value), and set/unset confirmations.
Build final envelope with entries array, total_entries, and action-specific fields (value, values, set, unset).

args: {% if action == 'list' %}--list{% elif action == 'get_all' %}--get-all{% elif action == 'unset' %}--unset{% endif %}
{% if action in ['get','get_all','set','unset'] and key %}{{ key }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'set' and value %}{{ value }}{% endif %}
output_gaps: structured entries array reduced to basic key-value pairs

compatible_downstream.description: Check working tree status after modifying config.

compatible_upstream.description: Receive a repository path from directory_list.
